description: Local-only Agentlas ontology recall at session start and point of need.

hooks.command: root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -x "${root}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" ]; then "${root}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" --host codex --event SessionStart; else printf '{}\n'; fi

root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -x "${root}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" ]; then "${root}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" --host codex --event UserPromptSubmit; else printf '{}\n'; fi
